left.contains: vertical text '3.5% OF WIDTH OF AD GIVES BOARDER SIZE' on pink background

right.contains: A wide vertical frame containing: at top, yellow box with text 'CONTAINER IS 25% OF WIDTH OF AD'; below, Amazon Prime logo and white text, and a pink box below that with text 'LOGO IS 60% WIDTH OF CONTAINER'

frameAnalysis.corners: The yellow information box is in the upper right, and the Amazon Prime logo and red instruction box are centrally placed vertically along the right-hand side.
frameAnalysis.instructions: Due to a very wide right-hand border and vertical text on the left, keep the central image and any potential overlaid titles contained within the central vertical portion of the image, primarily the middle 60%. The top and bottom 10% should be free of critical visual elements and titles, allowing only for background textures, as these areas are close to the frame edge. The hero subject or a central product should be perfectly centered horizontally and vertically within the visible area to maximize visibility.
